generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
// (No acting components in document)

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted directly on the permanent magnet synchronous motor to provide angular position data (r_M) for friction analysis in the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted behind the cycloidal gearbox to provide output angular position data (r_out) for backlash and positional uncertainty reduction in the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor input current (I_M) for torque estimation in the MABI MAX 100 first axis friction modeling."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance Sinumerik840DController : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller providing position, speed, and acceleration data for the MABI MAX 100 first axis via MQTT streaming."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SinumerikControllerDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance MotorEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance SinumerikControllerDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Sinumerik840DController
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance MotorGearboxStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram (BDD) and Internal Block Diagram (IBD) describing the structural composition of the MABI MAX 100 first axis (motor, gearwheel, cycloidal gearbox) and their rotational/current flows."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTooling
]

instance FrictionlessBaseModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink base model representing frictionless gearbox behavior for the MABI MAX 100 first axis as a reference point for friction analysis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTooling
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink implementation of Coulomb-Viscous friction model subtracted from the base model to compute friction losses in the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTooling
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink implementation of Stribeck friction model for dynamic friction parameter adjustment in the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTooling
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink implementation of Dahl friction model for detailed friction characterization in the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTooling
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink implementation of LuGre friction model combining white-box and black-box approaches for the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTooling
]

instance DynamicsCalculationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Manufacturer-provided dynamics model converting sensor inputs (I_M) to torque/velocity outputs for the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTooling
]

instance MeasuredMotorOutputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Actual angular position data (r_M) from the motor encoder for the MABI MAX 100 first axis, used for friction model validation."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionModelRefinementEnabler
]

instance MeasuredGearboxOutputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Actual angular position data (r_out) from the gearbox encoder for the MABI MAX 100 first axis, used for backlash and positional uncertainty analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionModelRefinementEnabler
]

instance MeasuredMotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor input current (I_M) data for torque estimation in the MABI MAX 100 first axis friction modeling."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DynamicsCalculationModel
]

instance SimulatedMotorOutputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived motor output angular velocity (δr_M) from the frictionless base model minus friction models for the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulinkSimulationOutput
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualization
]

instance SimulatedGearboxOutputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived gearwheel output angular velocity (δr_G) from the combined friction models for the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulinkSimulationOutput
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualization
]

instance SimulatedSystemOutputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived system output angular velocity (δr_out) from the combined friction models for the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulinkSimulationOutput
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualization
]

instance OperationalParametersData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time operational parameters (load, temperature) from the SINUMERIK 840D controller for event-driven friction model refinement in the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SinumerikControllerDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionModelRefinementEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance SysMLTooling : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling tools (Block Definition Diagrams and Internal Block Diagrams) for structural and behavioral modeling of the MABI MAX 100 first axis components."
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService
]

instance SimulinkTooling : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for executable simulation models of friction (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) and dynamics in the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionSimulationService
]

instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming from the Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller to the Digital Shadow for the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataIntegrationService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for semantic interoperability and metadata management (system configuration, data provenance) of the MABI MAX 100 first axis Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables MetadataManagementService
]

instance FrictionModelRefinementEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Combined white-box (analytical) and black-box (data-driven) friction model refinement system for the MABI MAX 100 first axis using live operational data."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelRefinementService
]

instance DashboardVisualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization dashboard (implemented with Simulink Dashboard) for comparing simulated vs. measured data in the MABI MAX 100 first axis Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance StructuralModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "SysML-based structural and behavioral modeling service for the MABI MAX 100 first axis components (motor, gearwheel, cycloidal gearbox)."
    DTDFVocab:provides AxisCompositionInsight
]

instance FrictionSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulink-based friction simulation service implementing multiple friction models (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) for the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionCharacterizationInsight
]

instance DataIntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "MQTT-based real-time data integration service streaming sensor data from the SINUMERIK 840D controller to the Digital Shadow for the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTraceabilityInsight
]

instance MetadataManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell service managing semantic metadata and configuration for the MABI MAX 100 first axis Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:provides ConfigurationInsight
]

instance FrictionModelRefinementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dynamic friction model refinement service combining white-box and black-box approaches to adjust friction parameters based on live operational data for the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterUpdateInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalRecommendationInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization dashboard service comparing simulated vs. measured torque, angular velocity, and acceleration data for the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviationAnalysisInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance AxisCompositionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Structural composition insight of the MABI MAX 100 first axis (motor, gearwheel, cycloidal gearbox) derived from SysML modeling."
]

instance FrictionCharacterizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of static, kinetic, and viscous friction components in the MABI MAX 100 first axis gearbox for targeted compensation in control algorithms."
]

instance DataTraceabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Traceability of data traces linking sensor readings to their computational origin (simulation models, sensor readings) for debugging and model validation in the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
]

instance ConfigurationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "System configuration and metadata management insight for the MABI MAX 100 first axis Digital Twin using Asset Administration Shell."
]

instance ParameterUpdateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Suggested adjustments to friction model parameters (e.g., Stribeck effect coefficients) for improved accuracy in the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
]

instance OperationalRecommendationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal operating conditions (speed ranges, load limits) to minimize friction-induced errors in the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
]

instance DeviationAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of discrepancies between simulated and measured data highlighting areas of friction loss or model inaccuracies in the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
]

// C12: Environment/Component
instance MabiMax100FirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical environment containing the MABI MAX 100 first axis components (motor, gearwheel, cycloidal gearbox) with restricted working range [-90°, 90°] and max angular velocity 75°/s."
    base:contains MotorComponent, GearwheelComponent, CycloidalGearboxComponent
]

instance MotorComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor in the MABI MAX 100 first axis providing torque and angular velocity dynamics."
    base:isContainedIn MabiMax100FirstAxisEnvironment
]

instance GearwheelComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearwheel in the MABI MAX 100 first axis transmitting torque between motor and cycloidal gearbox."
    base:isContainedIn MabiMax100FirstAxisEnvironment
]

instance CycloidalGearboxComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox in the MABI MAX 100 first axis providing high gear reduction with backlash characteristics."
    base:isContainedIn MabiMax100FirstAxisEnvironment
]

// C13: Data Flow Completion
instance SimulinkSimulationOutput : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Combined output data from all friction models (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) processed through Simulink for the MABI MAX 100 first axis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulinkTooling
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualization
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates on a **real-time, continuous time scale**, with data acquisition and model updates synchronized to the robot’s operational frequency. While exact sampling rates are not specified, the system supports **low-latency processing** (millisecond-scale) for friction identification, enabled by MQTT-based live data streaming and Simulink simulations. The twinning process is designed for **operational-time alignment**, ensuring that friction models are continuously updated during robot operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is **purpose-driven**, structured as follows:
   - **Core Components**:
     - **FrictionShadow** (identification element for the DS).
     - **Purpose**: Defined by the singleton class **FrictionDerivation** (understanding friction relations and loss detection).
     - **Asset**: The **MABI MAX first axis** (described via SysML SystemModel).
     - **Processing Components**: Three **Simulation** classes (Motor, Gearwheel, Gearbox) that compute derived data traces (e.g., ˆr_M, ˆr_G) using friction models.
     - **Data Sources**: Physical sensors (encoders, current sensors) and derived data (e.g., torque from dynamics models).
   - **Data Flow**:
     - **One-way data flow** from PT to DS (as per Digital Shadow definition), with **no feedback control** to the physical system.
     - **Traceability**: Data traces are linked to their **computational origin** (e.g., simulation model, sensor) via associations in the UML class diagram (Fig. 5)."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Shadow operates during the **operational phase** of the robot's life cycle, focusing on **as-operated** representation (real-time monitoring and adaptation). It does not cover:
   - **As-designed** (idealized models) or **as-manufactured** (initial calibration) stages, though engineering models (e.g., SysML structural diagrams) are used for **contextual representation**.
   The DS is designed to **continuously improve** friction models during operation, addressing **dynamic changes** (e.g., wear, tooling variations) via live data integration."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity considerations include:
   - **Model Fidelity**:
     - **White-box models** (analytical friction models) require **parameter tuning** (e.g., load, temperature dependencies) for accuracy.
     - **Black-box models** (data-driven) eliminate parameter identification but may lack **physical interpretability**.
     - **Multi-physics integration** (combining torque, current, and velocity) ensures **cross-validation** of friction effects.
   - **Validation Mechanisms**:
     - **Comparison of simulated vs. measured data** (e.g., torque, angular velocity) in the dashboard to detect deviations.
     - **Uncertainty quantification**: Implicit in the **difference between measured (r_M, r_G, r_out) and simulated (ˆr_M, ˆr_G, ˆr_out) traces**.
     - **Traceability**: Data provenance ensures **auditability** of model computations (e.g., which friction model was applied).
   - **Error Sources**:
     - **Sensor noise** (encoder resolution, current measurement inaccuracies).
     - **Model simplifications** (e.g., assumptions in friction equations).
     - **Dynamic changes** (wear, temperature drift) require **continuous recalibration** of models."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between the PT and DT involves:
   - **Network Protocol**: **MQTT** for **real-time, low-latency data streaming** of sensor data (e.g., I_M, encoder readings) from the Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller to the DS.
   - **Data Format**: Time-series data (e.g., torque, angular velocity) as **floating-point arrays** with metadata (e.g., source, timestamp).
   - **Communication Architecture**:
     - **Publisher-Subscriber model** (MQTT) for decoupled data flow from PT to DS.
     - **No return path** (consistent with Digital Shadow definition), though the DS could theoretically feed refined models back to the controller via **additional middleware** (not implemented in this use case)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards:
   - **SysML** (OMG standard) for **system modeling** (BDDs, IBDs).
   - **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)** (IEC/ISO 62424) for **semantic interoperability** and metadata management.
   - **MQTT (OASIS standard)** for **real-time data streaming**.
   - **No explicit mention of other standards** (e.g., IEC 62264 for manufacturing data exchange, or ISO 15926 for lifecycle modeling)."
]
